rationale: The cited paper appears as one entry in the citing paper's Table 1 that summarizes prior channel-governance studies and their findings on opportunism. It is used as part of broad literature mapping (i.e., prior work largely focused on opportunism), not as a distinct source for the focal hypotheses, model structure, measures, or empirical design. The main theoretical development in the citing paper draws on agency-theory arguments and other specific references, with no clear functional dependence on this particular 2003 study.
